data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. TEMPO TABLET is yet to break through in six starts but has run a number of placings. Hit the frame again last start finishing third (31.26) at this track. Ran home strongly last start and can measure up this time. 8. STORM'S THUNDER is overdue for a maiden success having placed at four of 12 starts, the latest missing the frame when fifth at this track. Has run some solid races in strong maiden fields. Can figure in the finish. 3. OPAWA JAZZY has missed the frame at her last two but did run well three back when second (31.03) in a Class 0 at this track. Can turn it around this time. 7. OPAWA MOLLY gets a chance to redeem an unplaced effort here when making debut. Had run third in a four dog trial (17.37) on this track over 295m prior to debut run.","runners":[5,8,3,7],"exclusive":false}
